heading: Disposition of surplus or obsolete personal property
label: 1386 Disposition of surplus or obsolete personal property
text: The Executive Director may, within the limits of available appropriations, dispose of surplus or obsolete personal property by interagency transfer, donation, or discarding.
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–68, div. A, title I, § 1101(c)123 Stat. 2031Oct. 1, 2009“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2010, and each fiscal year thereafter.”
